branches.label: LOCATIONS
branches.title: How to get to us
branches.remote_desc: Not in Turkistan? No problem. We offer live interactive online classes from anywhere in the world.

pricing.desc: Whether it's IELTS, General English, or Kids courses, we guarantee the best approach. Contact us to book your spot!

founder.name: Symbat Paya
founder.role: Founder of Simba's School & Official IELTS Partner
founder.bio1: Hi, I'm Symbat! When I founded Simba's School, my dream was to bring world-class English education to the youth of Turkistan. I wanted to build more than a language center—I wanted to create a community of global thinkers.
founder.bio2: As an official IELTS partner, my personal mission is to help you break barriers and achieve your highest goals on the global stage. Welcome to our family!
